name: GH_ExpandMode
summary: Enumerates the possible expansion modes for structure paths.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Indicates no expansion should take place.

enum_values.name: SimpleReplace
enum_values.summary: Paths are expanded and collisions are erased.

enum_values.name: SimpleAppend
enum_values.summary: Paths are expanded and merged with colliding paths.

enum_values.name: Recursive
enum_values.summary: Before a path is expanded, any collision is expanded first.
